---
title: 'KINDRED: Heterogeneous Split-Lock Architecture for Safe Autonomous Machines'
author:
- Yiming Gan
- Jingwen Leng
- Bo Yu
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3711924
journ: TACO
year: 2025
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 90
---
